changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE control_tests ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, assessment_id integer DEFAULT NULL, control_function_id integer DEFAULT NULL, control_category_id integer DEFAULT NULL, control_subcategory_id integer DEFAULT NULL, assessment_weight_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_control_tests PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_assessment FOREIGN KEY (assessment_id) REFERENCES assessments (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_control_function FOREIGN KEY (control_function_id) REFERENCES control_functions (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_control_category FOREIGN KEY (control_category_id) REFERENCES control_categories (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_control_subcategory FOREIGN KEY (control_subcategory_id) REFERENCES control_subcategories (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_assessment_weight FOREIGN KEY (assessment_weight_id) REFERENCES assessment_weights (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_organization ON control_tests (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_assessment_type ON control_tests (assessment_id); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_assessment_control_function ON control_tests (control_function_id); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_assessment_control_category ON control_tests (control_category_id); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_assessment_control_subcategory ON control_tests (control_subcategory_id); CREATE INDEX i_control_tests_assessment_assessment_weight ON control_tests (assessment_weight_id);
